title: Tech stocks on pace for best 6 months since 2023 — even with much of the 'Magnificent 7' in the 'penalty box': Chart of the Day

summary: The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (NASDAQ:IGV) closed Friday at $88.20, down 16.5% year to date and 18.9% over the past year, despite the broader AI trade still drawing capital. title: Microsoft vs Alphabet: One Bets on OpenAI While The Other Controls Its Own AI Destiny. This Is The Better Buy Today
summary: Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT) and Alphabet (NASDAQ:GOOG) both reported earnings on April 29, 2026. Microsoft leaned on enterprise cloud and Copilot seats. Alphabet leaned on Search resilience and a hyper-growing cloud unit. Both beat estimates. Both are spending unprecedented sums on AI infrastructure. The market has punished both anyway. title: How New AI Cloud Partnerships And Rising Costs At Microsoft (MSFT) Have Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In recent weeks, partners such as Tech Mahindra, FPT, Chevron, Morningstar, PitchBook and ICON have announced expanded collaborations with Microsoft that embed Azure, Copilot and other cloud-AI services into telecom networks, clinical trials, financial workflows and hyperscale data centers. At the same time, mounting regulatory scrutiny in Europe, higher hardware costs, and Xbox price rises underline how Microsoft’s AI push is reshaping everything from compliance risks to consumer pricing...

title: UK may intervene in $110 billion Paramount-Warner Bros Discovery deal
summary: LONDON, June 30 (Reuters) - Britain said on Tuesday it could intervene in Paramount Skydance Corp's proposed takeover of Warner Bros Discovery, potentially holding up the $110 billion deal after the U. and China gave it the green light.
